name: Simplicity
effective_cost: Free — no annual fee, ever, and no late fees or penalty APR either

verdict.text: The most forgiving Citi card to carry a balance on — no late fees and no penalty APR, ever — but it earns nothing. Good as a safety-net card for a balance transfer or a purchase you need time to pay off; not a card to use for everyday spend once the intro period ends.

earn_note: Simplicity earns no cash back, points, or miles at all — like Diamond Preferred, it's built around APR mechanics instead of rewards. Its distinguishing feature isn't the intro rate itself (Diamond Preferred's is essentially the same) but Citi's explicit promise of no late fees and no penalty APR, ever, for the life of the account.

points.note: No points or cash-back program of any kind. 0% intro APR for 12 months on purchases and 21 months on balance transfers from account opening (transfers must post within the first 4 months), then a 17.49%–28.24% variable ongoing APR based on creditworthiness.

transfer_partners.highlight: No rewards currency exists on this card, so there is nothing to transfer.

protection_note: Bare-bones by design, same as Diamond Preferred — Citi's page for this card doesn't advertise purchase protection, extended warranty, or travel insurance. What is explicitly guaranteed instead is the payment-forgiveness structure: no late fees and no penalty APR, ever, regardless of missed payments.
rental_note: No rental car coverage advertised — use a different card for rentals.

services.name: 0% intro APR
services.detail: 0% for 12 months on purchases and 21 months on balance transfers from account opening; balance transfers must be completed within the first 4 months.

services.name: Balance transfer fee
services.detail: 3% of each transfer ($5 minimum) if completed within the first 4 months of account opening; 5% of each transfer ($5 minimum) after that.

services.name: No late fees, ever
services.detail: Citi's headline feature for this card — missing a payment never triggers a late fee, unlike virtually every other credit card on the market.

services.name: No penalty APR, ever
services.detail: A late or missed payment also never triggers a penalty interest rate — your APR stays the same regardless of payment history.

services.name: Foreign transaction fee applies
services.detail: 3% of the U.S. dollar amount of each transaction (Citi's standard rate, matching Diamond Preferred and the Secured Mastercard) — not built for international use.

services.name: Citi Flex Pay
services.detail: Convert eligible purchases into fixed monthly payments while continuing to use the card normally.

services.name: Free FICO Score access
services.detail: View your FICO Score at no cost through the Citi app or site.

services.name: Citi Quick Lock
services.detail: Instantly lock and unlock the card from the app if it's misplaced.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Free to add — no annual fee for authorized users
No rewards earned — this card has no rewards program to share

additional_cards.note: Free to add, but since Simplicity itself earns nothing, the only upside for an authorized user is shared access to the card's forgiving payment terms, not rewards.
